data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data through encryption, both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 implementation for data in transit; encrypted databases or file systems.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Defends against common web threats such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a WAF solution like AWS WAF or Cloudflare WAF.

data.title: Security Patches
data.description: Regular updates and patches to protect against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management systems for rapid deployment.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System
data.description: Monitors network traffic for suspicious activity.
data.technical_spec: Employs solutions like Snort or Suricata.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.technical_spec: Integration with 2FA solutions, potentially supporting hardware tokens or mobile apps.
